title: Kadha Kadha Lyrics Aaha Kalyanam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kadha kadha
Singer: Chinmayi
Movie: Aaha Kalyanam
Music : Dharan Kumar
Lyrics : Karky

Kadha kadha kadhakelu
iva iva kadha kelu
kerangadikkura azhagoda boomi vandhaa
idhu idhu idhuvenum
adhu adhu adhu venum
adambidikkura thadapoda vazhndhu vandhaa
idhayum avalukku avale mudiveduppaa
uduthum udayum avale vadivamaippaa
varusam mulusum pala pasanga varisayil ninaangale
ada ivala madakka evalukkum mudiyalaye

aana ippa madangittaa
oruthan azhagil sokki poitaa

kadhalile unna nenjila poottikittaa
nee sirikka iva vetkatha maathikittaa (3)

naanana naananaa na dum dum dum
naanana naananaa na dum dum dum

idhu idhu idhakelu
iva iva iva kadhakelu
manapparikkura sripoda boomi vandhaan
orukavalayum illaama
alayira oru singam
dhinam dhinam adhupola vazhndhu vandhaan

dhinamum avan pasichathaana mulichiduvaan
mudiyakalachi ivan jeansayum kilichiduvan
ponna paarthaa ivan kadalayum malaya
pozhinjiduvaan
kolanji kolanji ivan aruviya valainjiduvaan

aana ippaa sikkikittaan
oruththi azhagil sokki poyittaan

kadhalile unna nenjila poottikittaan
un sirippil avan semmaya maathikittaan

naanana naananaa na dum dum dum
naanana naananaa na dum dum dum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadha Kadha?

The song is a romantic and upbeat melody that celebrates love and joy.

Who is the singer of Kadha Kadha?

The song is sung by Chinmayi.

Who composed the music for Aaha Kalyanam?

The music was composed by Dharan Kumar.

What is the release year of Aaha Kalyanam?

The movie was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadha Kadha from Aaha Kalyanam is a lively and romantic track that captures the excitement of love and celebration. Sung by Chinmayi, the song's upbeat melody and joyful lyrics make it perfect for weddings and parties. The music by Dharan Kumar adds a vibrant energy that complements the theme of the movie. This song evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness, making it a memorable addition to any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kadha Kadha from the movie Aaha Kalyanam. Chinmayi's enchanting voice combined with Dharan Kumar's lively music creates a captivating melody. Dive into this romantic and upbeat track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration.
stanzaMeanings: Listen to the stories, these are the stories. The earth came with beauty, wanting this and that. She lives with pride, making her own decisions. She decides her own style and dresses. Many boys line up, but no one can win her over.
But now, she has changed, and one guy is mesmerized by her beauty.
In love, if you lock her in your heart, she will shyly smile at you.
Listen to this, listen to these stories. The earth came with a carefree spirit, living like a lion every day without worries.
Every day, he wakes up hungry, tears his jeans, and when he sees a girl, he falls in love and gets lost in thoughts.
But now, he is caught, mesmerized by one girl's beauty.
In love, he locked her in his heart, and she changed beautifully with his smile.
